subcodes.first_line: O ye remnants of them that sacrificed themselves for the Beauty of the All-Merciful, ye lovers of the countenance of the Beloved, ye who are captive in the snares of His tresses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بقیه فداایان جمال رحمن آن عاشقان روی جانان و آن افتادگان در دام موی دلبر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment
